scenarios.name: Artifact schema validation
scenarios.description: Validated the April 16 artifact directory with the repository schema validator.
scenarios.details: `node schemas/validate.js content/days/2026-04-16` passes decision.json, spec.md, build-summary.md, review.md, test-results.json, and feedback-digest.json.

scenarios.name: Scenario difficulty validation
scenarios.description: April 16 includes Briar Sniper, so the validator returns indeterminate and exits 0 rather than claiming the board is easy or hard.
scenarios.details: `npm run validate:scenario-difficulty -- --date 2026-04-16` reports: Result: indeterminate — scenario references ranged enemy behaviors (briarSniper) that the difficulty validator does not simulate. Verdict deferred to runtime probe and Playwright specs.

scenarios.name: Briar Sniper targeted Playwright coverage
scenarios.description: Ran the new sniper, scout, tutorial-gate, texture, accessibility, responsive, and roster asset specs for April 16.
scenarios.details: 27 targeted specs pass: game-briar-sniper.spec.js (5), game-briar-sniper-aim-line-accessibility.spec.js (5), game-briar-sniper-texture-validation.spec.js (2), game-board-scout-briar-sniper-priority.spec.js (4), game-board-scout-2026-04-16.spec.js (3), game-tutorial-challenge-endless-gating-2026-04-16.spec.js (1), game-shell-responsive-2026-04-16.spec.js (3), game-tutorial-wave-plant-gate.spec.js (1), game-roster-assets.spec.js (3). Covers FSM states, aim telegraph render-on-idle→aim, tile-snapshot projectile resolution, attacker-only screening with retargeting, Board Scout Ranged chip and detail panel, wave-level plant gate (including placeDefender rejection of plants not in the active wave's override), and manifest-backed art.

scenarios.name: Full Playwright suite
scenarios.description: Ran the full UI/UX test suite with `npm run test:uiux`.
scenarios.details: 387 tests total, 387 pass, 0 unexpected. Verified across two back-to-back full-suite runs under 7 workers (48.9s, 47.5s). Baseline failures resolved in this branch: (a) 16 community-pulse tests now pass after the April 16 feedback-digest.json populates recentReactions, which unhides the community-pulse section and the secondary #todays-change CTA; (b) 2 homepage-links tests that expected the secondary CTA now pass for the same reason; (c) 1 game-board-scout Glass Ram speed assertion was updated from 50 to 36 to match the shipped source value; (d) game-sunroot-texture-validation.spec.js 'Phaser texture manager holds sunroot-bloom' test previously raced boot-stage SVG decoding under parallel load — now gated on an explicit waitForFunction for textures.exists('sunroot-bloom'), so the full suite is reliably green in parallel. Sniper-day targeted coverage remains fully green.
